fsymId.description: Requested Identifier. Must be a valid Benchmark Identifier recognized by FactSet.

date.description: The respective date for values as of the date requested in YYYY-MM-DD format.

constituentNumber.description: The total number of constituents as of the date requested.

currency.description: Currency Code used in adjustments. If no Currency was requested, the service will default to LOCAL ('LOC').

marketValue.description: Index Level Market Capitalization as of the date requested expressed in millions.

totalReturnPercent.description: Index Level Total Return Percent Change

returnType.description: The requested Return Type - GROSS or NET

hedgeType.description: The requested Hedge Type - HEDGED or UNHEDGED

requestId.description: Benchmark Identifier specified in the request

observationDate.description: This field will always return the date of the data that was actually returned.
